attackDiscoveries.title: Enterprise-Wide APT Campaign with Ransomware
attackDiscoveries.summaryMarkdown: Sophisticated multi-stage attack targeting production infrastructure across 50+ servers
attackDiscoveries.detailsMarkdown: 8-phase attack: (1) Network reconnaissance via port scanning, (2) SSH brute force against 100 targets, (3) Successful compromise of 50 hosts, (4) Post-exploitation with malware deployment and persistence, (5) Lateral movement across network segments, (6) Credential theft from 50 compromised systems, (7) Exfiltration of 250GB+ sensitive data including databases and PII, (8) Ransomware deployment with service disruption and backup deletion
